name: @gluonjs/core
description: A native-first UI system built on Custom Elements, HTML template literals, and adopted stylesheets.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:ui && npm run build:router && npm run build:store && npm run build:ssr && npm run build:compiler && npm run build:vite && npm run build:test-utils && npm run build:devtools-api && npm run build:devtools && npm run build:language-server && npm run build:vue-analyzer && npm run build:create-gluon && npm run build:shop && npm run build:shop:server && npm run build:shop:static && npm run build:playground && npm run build:docs
scripts.build:core: npm run build:reactivity && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:ui: npm run build:quarks && npm run build:atoms && npm run build:molecules && npm run build:organisms
scripts.build:docs: npm run docs:api && node scripts/build-docs.mjs && npm run build:docs-examples
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:core && npm run typecheck:ui && npm run typecheck:reactivity && npm run typecheck:router && npm run typecheck:store && npm run typecheck:ssr && npm run typecheck:compiler && npm run typecheck:vite && npm run typecheck:test-utils && npm run typecheck:devtools-api && npm run typecheck:devtools && npm run typecheck:language-server && npm run typecheck:vue-analyzer && npm run typecheck:create-gluon && npm run typecheck:docs
scripts.typecheck:ui: npm run typecheck --workspace @gluonjs/quarks && npm run typecheck --workspace @gluonjs/atoms && npm run typecheck --workspace @gluonjs/molecules && npm run typecheck --workspace @gluonjs/organisms
scripts.test: npm run test:browser && npm run test:reactivity && npm run test:router && npm run test:store && npm run test:ssr && npm run test:vite && npm run test:test-utils && npm run test:devtools-api && npm run test:devtools && npm run test:language-server && npm run test:vue-analyzer && npm run test:create-gluon && npm run test:playground
scripts.test:vue-analyzer: npm run build:vue-analyzer && vitest run --config vitest.vue-analyzer.config.ts
scripts.test:playground: vitest run --config vitest.playground-node.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.playground.config.ts
scripts.test:browser-matrix: npm run test:browser && npm run test:router-browser && npm run test:test-utils && npm run test:devtools && vitest run --config vitest.playground.config.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:browser:coverage && npm run test:reactivity:coverage && npm run test:router:coverage && npm run test:router-browser:coverage && npm run test:store:coverage && npm run test:ssr:coverage && npm run test:vite:coverage && npm run test:test-utils:coverage && npm run test:devtools-api:coverage && npm run test:devtools:coverage && npm run test:language-server:coverage && npm run test:vue-analyzer:coverage && npm run test:create-gluon:coverage
scripts.test:vue-analyzer:coverage: npm run build:vue-analyzer && vitest run --config vitest.vue-analyzer.config.ts --coverage
scripts.check:stateful-control-comparison: npm run build:compiler && npm run build:language-server && node scripts/validate-stateful-form-control-comparison.mjs
scripts.test:property-fuzz: npm run build:vue-analyzer && vitest run --config vitest.quality.config.ts
scripts.check:shop-performance: npm run build:core && npm run build:compiler && npm run build:vite && npm run benchmark:shop-flow
scripts.check:budgets: npm run build:shop && npm run check:quality-budgets
scripts.check:docs: npm run typecheck:docs && npm run build:docs && node scripts/validate-docs.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run check:shop-boundaries && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:playground && npm run test:property-fuzz && npm run check:quality-budgets && npm run check:security && npm run check:ui-contract && npm run typecheck:core-api && npm run typecheck:ui-api && npm run typecheck:reactivity-api && npm run typecheck:router-api && npm run typecheck:store-api && npm run typecheck:test-utils-api && npm run typecheck:tooling-api && npm run typecheck:ssr-api && npm run typecheck:devtools-api-contract && npm run typecheck:language-server-api && npm run typecheck:vue-analyzer-api && npm run typecheck:create-gluon-api && npm run check:router-lazy && npm run check:packages && npm run check:vscode-client && npm run check:language-server-cli && npm run check:diagnostics && npm run check:template-composition && npm run check:stateful-control-comparison && npm run check:create-gluon-fixtures && npm run check:vue-analyzer-fixtures && npm run check:vue-analyzer-clean-install && npm run check:vue-codemod-decision && npm run check:dx-scorecard && npm run check:docs && npm run check:release-bootstrap && npm run check:release-contract && npm run check:release-artifacts
